faults.title: Water inlet timeout
faults.description: Check tap, inlet valve, pressure, and filter mesh.

faults.title: Drain timeout
faults.description: Inspect drain pump, hose, and filter chamber.

faults.title: Door lock fault
faults.description: Check door lock, strike, and PCB drive/feedback.

faults.title: Motor / inverter fault
faults.description: Inspect motor, hall/tacho, inverter stage, and harness.

faults.description: Check pressure sensor hose, air trap, and valve leakage.

faults.title: Heating sensor issue
faults.description: Inspect NTC, heater, and connector integrity.
